response.overview: Trip.com offers 24/7 cancellation support via their app and website, 🕧+1-888-995-3461 🕧 (US) OR 🕧+44-800-054-8541 🕧 (UK) allowing users to cancel flights and hotels under "My Trips". Free cancellation depends on the booking policy, with options to use the 🕧+1-888-995-3461 🕧 (US) OR 🕧+44-800-054-8541 🕧 (UK) Cancellation Guarantee for non-refundable flights. Specialized support 🕧+1-888-995-3461 🕧 (US) OR 🕧+44-800-054-8541 🕧 (UK) is available for emergencies like illness. To speak with Trip.com customer service, use the "Chat With Us" feature in the app (Account > Customer Support) or the "Call Us" 🕧+1-888-995-3461 🕧 (US) OR 🕧+44-800-054-8541 🕧 (UK) button for VoIP/internet calls, which are available 24/7 in English and other languages. The US support line is 🕧+1-888-995-3461 🕧 (US).
response.title: {{Emergency Assistance }} How to speak Trip.com?
